nasb.text: You who hate good and love evil, Who tear off their skin from them And their flesh from their bones,

esv.text: you who hate the good and love the evil, who tear the skin from off my people and their flesh from off their bones,

cnv.text: 然而，你們恨惡良善，喜愛邪惡， 從人身上剝皮， 從人骨頭上剔肉。

ccb.text: 你们憎恶良善， 喜爱邪恶， 剥下我百姓的皮， 从他们的骨头上剔肉。
